name: Topscore Fashion Co., Ltd.
summary: Topscore Fashion Co., Ltd. provides footwear products primarily in China. It offers leather, fur, and feather footwear products under the KISSCAT, Kiss Kitty, ZSAZSAZSU, Tigrisso, and Patricia brands. The company markets its products through physical channels, marketing outlets, and e-commerce channels. It operates approximately 2,000 marketing outlets. The company was formerly known as TopScore Fashion Shoes Co., Ltd. Topscore Fashion Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
